name: The Man in The Artificer Mask

sheet.name: The Man in The Artificer Mask
sheet.background_story:
A man who has an ancient device called the Artificer's Mask seemingly bonded irreversibly to his face.

Although the eyes of the mask glow and dim bright blue when the man is trying to verbally communicate, he is a mute who cannot form any intelligible languages that are spoken in the Foresaken Lands.

However, both his inductive and deductive abilities have, at times, been able to help find links between ancient texts stored at The Stalwart Fortress.

Although rarely venturing past the Stalwart's walls, he decides to embark on a journey with the rest of the pilgrims to follow clues left behind the mysterious Urmenos
